segments.text: Actually, it's Laryx who's adjusting their approach
segments.original_text: なくって逆にラリックス選手が出し分けるみたいな感じですかね

segments.text: So when Laryx goes up against other Falco mains,
segments.original_text: なのでラリックス選手対他のファルコ使いってなると

segments.text: We rarely get to see Falco mirrors, but
segments.original_text: 結構ファルコミラー見ることお預けになるんですけど

full_text: Actually, it's Laryx who's adjusting their approach. So when Laryx goes up against other Falco mains, we rarely get to see Falco mirrors, but we have one this time. And
